description: Generate a multi-Reynolds number aerodynamic dataset for a NACA 4415 airfoil in QBlade. Perform XFoil analyses at Reynolds numbers of 1,000,000, 3,000,000, and 5,000,000 using Ncrit=9 and an alpha range of -5 to 20 degrees. Extrapolate the resulting polars to 360 degrees using the Viterna method. Export the three extrapolated polars to ~/Documents/polars/NACA4415_1M_360.dat, ~/Documents/polars/NACA4415_3M_360.dat, and ~/Documents/polars/NACA4415_5M_360.dat. Save the QBlade project to ~/Documents/projects/re_dataset_study.wpa.
